title: Project Report: Nonprofit Donor Tracker — Salesforce CRM Developer / Administrator
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: Custom objects for Donors and Donations, page layouts, reports, and a simple Flow for thank-you email.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Beginner)*

**Nonprofit Donor Tracker** is a beginner-level end-to-end project for Salesforce CRM Developer / Administrator. Duration: 2–3 weeks. Custom objects for Donors and Donations, page layouts, reports, and a simple Flow for thank-you email. Tools: Salesforce Developer Edition, Flow Builder.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: Custom Donor and Donation objects
Objective: Page layouts and list views
Objective: Donation summary report
Objective: Record-triggered thank-you email Flow
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Salesforce CRM Developer / Administrator portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Salesforce CRM Developer / Administrator resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Salesforce CRM Developer / Administrator resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Beginner)*

Submit all final deliverables: DE org config; Report screenshots; Flow demo. Skills demonstrated: Salesforce admin, Objects, Flows. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: DE org config
Deliverable: Report screenshots
Deliverable: Flow demo
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits DE org config and passes the rubric.
key_takeaways: Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.
